scoring-irt-lines.rationale: NFR32 — scoring engine cognitive-load cap (~250 LOC). Solo-dev must be able to mind the whole auditable scoring engine end-to-end.

css-components-lines.rationale: NFR32 — total CSS body across components (~1500 LOC). Beyond this, design-system complexity exceeds solo-dev review budget.

app-modules-bytes.rationale: INTERIM-DEMO BUMP 2 (60416 → 62464, 59 KB → 61 KB): demo-readiness round 2 added the honest print-to-PDF result summary (result.js PRINT button + print-only masthead + bindPrint window.print() wiring; posture-respecting, NOT a certificate), the result-scene incomplete-session crash guard (routing redirect), the FR12 dwell-gate hint (consent.js), the non-EN draft-translation banner (main.js), and the landing-only language-switcher gate. Measured 61151 B after comment-trimming; +~1.3 KB keeps the ~2% explicit-justification margin. The earlier INTERIM-DEMO bump's result-label/picture-option work is also resident. INTERIM-DEMO BUMP (59392 → 60416, 58 KB → 59 KB): demo-readiness pass added image-tile option rendering with localized a11y labels (item-runner.js), the stub augmentation-disable guard, and the result-scene comprehension fix — visible metric under-labels + a one-line plain-language explainer (result.js). Measured 59394 B at the 58 KB ceiling after trimming added comments; +~1 KB raise keeps the explicit-justification discipline. Result copy/labels are UI strings mirrored to the RU/PL English-stub bundles (clinical-register translation remains Gate-9c/9d). STORY-7.6 BUMP (57344 → 59392, 56 KB → 58 KB): Story 7.6 added tail-scenes-url.js (pure per-locale tail-scenes path helper) + result.js active-locale tail-scenes fetch with EN fallback (FR19 — RU/PL tail-scene loading infra; clinical-register copy itself is Gate-9c/9d-gated). Measured 57389 B at the 56 KB ceiling; +~2 KB raise keeps the explicit-justification discipline. STORY-7.2 BUMP (55296 → 57344, 54 KB → 56 KB): the explicit next raise the Story-7.1 rationale anticipated. Added locale-switch-blocker-hint.js (FR8 teachable-moment hint, UX-DR27) + main.js onBlockedAttempt wiring. Measured 56537 B; +~807 B (~1.4%) margin keeps the tight discipline. STORY-7.1 BUMP (48128 → 55296, 47 KB → 54 KB): the Epic-7 i18n harness landed under src/assessment/ exactly as this budget's prior rationale anticipated ('Epic-7 i18n locale-loading weight, when it lands, raises this ceiling WITH a documented justification, not pre-emptively'). Added: language-switcher.js (keyboard-first EN/RU/PL radio group + NFR9 opt-in persist + FR8 in-session guard seam) + locale-loader.js extensions (SUPPORTED/normalizeLocale/resolveInitialLocale/t) + main.js boot-locale resolution. Measured 54326 B; +~970 B (~1.8%) margin keeps the deliberately-tight discipline so the next raise (Story 7.2 locale-switch-blocker-hint.js) is again EXPLICIT, not a silent stamp. NFR32 — assessment SPA modules budget (47 KB raw). Aligned with NFR21 vanilla-ES2022 + NFR33 zero-runtime-dep posture. PRINCIPLED RE-PIN (bridge-7-8-5): supersedes the five ad-hoc per-story raises across Epic-6 (30 KB Epic-1 → 34 KB 6.2 → 40 KB 6.4 → 44 KB 6.5 → 48 KB 6.7) which the 6-7 round-1 review flagged as decaying toward a rubber stamp (~60% growth, each raise individually justified but never audited as a whole). Post-trim: bridge-7-8-5 consolidated the HTML escape (escapeText/escapeAttr) + interpolation (fmt) helpers — formerly copy-pasted across consent/error-fallback/landing/theme/item-runner/result — into the shared src/assessment/html-util.js, recovering headroom (measured ~47.2 KB after dedup) with no behavior change. The 47 KB (48128 B) ceiling = measured size + a deliberately tight (~2%) margin to force EXPLICIT justification for the next raise rather than another silent stamp. Epic-7 i18n locale-loading weight, when it lands under src/assessment/, raises this ceiling WITH a documented justification (the principled process), not pre-emptively. test-hook.js is dev-time-only (activated by ?test=1; Story 3-7) — excluded from production-modules accounting. cite-this-page.js (Story 4-6) is methodology-corpus-only — injected by tools/build-methodology.mjs into static methodology pages, never loaded by the assessment SPA. Story 7.6 added tail-scenes-url.js (pure per-locale tail-scenes path helper) + result.js active-locale tail-scenes fetch with EN fallback (FR19 — RU/PL tail-scene loading infra; clinical-register copy itself is Gate-9c/9d-gated). Measured 57389 B at the 56 KB ceiling; +~2 KB raise keeps the explicit-justification discipline. STORY-7.2 BUMP (55296 → 57344, 54 KB → 56 KB): the explicit next raise the Story-7.1 rationale anticipated. Added locale-switch-blocker-hint.js (FR8 teachable-moment hint, UX-DR27) + main.js onBlockedAttempt wiring. Measured 56537 B; +~807 B (~1.4%) margin keeps the tight discipline. STORY-7.1 BUMP (48128 → 55296, 47 KB → 54 KB): the Epic-7 i18n harness landed under src/assessment/ exactly as this budget's prior rationale anticipated ('Epic-7 i18n locale-loading weight, when it lands, raises this ceiling WITH a documented justification, not pre-emptively'). Added: language-switcher.js (keyboard-first EN/RU/PL radio group + NFR9 opt-in persist + FR8 in-session guard seam) + locale-loader.js extensions (SUPPORTED/normalizeLocale/resolveInitialLocale/t) + main.js boot-locale resolution. Measured 54326 B; +~970 B (~1.8%) margin keeps the deliberately-tight discipline so the next raise (Story 7.2 locale-switch-blocker-hint.js) is again EXPLICIT, not a silent stamp. NFR32 — assessment SPA modules budget (47 KB raw). Aligned with NFR21 vanilla-ES2022 + NFR33 zero-runtime-dep posture. PRINCIPLED RE-PIN (bridge-7-8-5): supersedes the five ad-hoc per-story raises across Epic-6 (30 KB Epic-1 → 34 KB 6.2 → 40 KB 6.4 → 44 KB 6.5 → 48 KB 6.7) which the 6-7 round-1 review flagged as decaying toward a rubber stamp (~60% growth, each raise individually justified but never audited as a whole). Post-trim: bridge-7-8-5 consolidated the HTML escape (escapeText/escapeAttr) + interpolation (fmt) helpers — formerly copy-pasted across consent/error-fallback/landing/theme/item-runner/result — into the shared src/assessment/html-util.js, recovering headroom (measured ~47.2 KB after dedup) with no behavior change. The 47 KB (48128 B) ceiling = measured size + a deliberately tight (~2%) margin to force EXPLICIT justification for the next raise rather than another silent stamp. Epic-7 i18n locale-loading weight, when it lands under src/assessment/, raises this ceiling WITH a documented justification (the principled process), not pre-emptively. test-hook.js is dev-time-only (activated by ?test=1; Story 3-7) — excluded from production-modules accounting. cite-this-page.js (Story 4-6) is methodology-corpus-only — injected by tools/build-methodology.mjs into static methodology pages, never loaded by the assessment SPA.

i18n-harness-bytes.rationale: NFR32 — i18n harness footprint (~15 KB raw). Locale loader is a runtime harness in Domain A; budget kept tight per NFR33.

methodology-pages-en.rationale: NFR32 — EN methodology corpus page count. Original ~30 corpus pages + ~5 glossary entries (Story 5.2) + ~2 tail-scene placeholders (Story 5.6) + headroom for v0.5→v1.0 editorial expansion.

methodology-pages-ru.rationale: NFR32 — RU methodology corpus page count. Mirrors EN budget (45) now that Story 7.3 landed the full RU mirror (~30 corpus + ~5 glossary + tail-scene placeholders + headroom). Story 7.3 raised 30→45.

methodology-pages-pl.rationale: NFR32 — PL methodology corpus page count. Mirrors EN budget (45) now that Story 7.4 landed the full PL mirror (~30 corpus + ~5 glossary + tail-scene placeholders + headroom). Story 7.4 raised 30→45.
